original:
---
name: prometheus-agent
description: Developer reference for the Prometheus strategic planner agent prompt loaders, prompts-core markdown variants, and model routing.
---
zh_tw:
---
name: prometheus-agent
description: Prometheus 策略規劃器 agent prompt 載入器、prompts-core Markdown 變體與模型路由的開發者參考資料。
---

original: # src/agents/prometheus/ -- Strategic Planner
zh_tw: # src/agents/prometheus/ -- 策略規劃器

original: ## OVERVIEW
zh_tw: ## 概覽

original: 5 TypeScript files plus 3 markdown prompt variants in [`packages/prompts-core/prompts/prometheus/`](file:///Users/yeongyu/local-workspaces/omo/packages/prompts-core/prompts/prometheus/). Prometheus remains the interview-mode strategic planner, but this directory is now a thin adapter layer. Prompt content lives in `packages/prompts-core`; `src/agents/prometheus/` only loads the right markdown variant and applies runtime tool gating.
zh_tw: 在 [`packages/prompts-core/prompts/prometheus/`](file:///Users/yeongyu/local-workspaces/omo/packages/prompts-core/prompts/prometheus/) 中有 5 個 TypeScript 檔案加上 3 個 Markdown prompt 變體。Prometheus 仍然是訪談模式的策略規劃器，但這個目錄現在只是薄薄的一層適配器。Prompt 內容放在 `packages/prompts-core`；`src/agents/prometheus/` 只負責載入正確的 Markdown 變體並套用執行期工具閘門。

original: This shape follows the package layering refactor in [`ROADMAP.md`](file:///Users/yeongyu/local-workspaces/omo/ROADMAP.md): prompts are harness-neutral core assets, while the OpenCode adapter keeps only model routing and runtime integration.
zh_tw: 這種結構遵循 [`ROADMAP.md`](file:///Users/yeongyu/local-workspaces/omo/ROADMAP.md) 中的套件分層重構：prompts 是與 harness 無關的核心資產，而 OpenCode adapter 只保留模型路由與執行期整合。

original: ## FILES
zh_tw: ## 檔案

original:
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `index.ts` | Barrel exports |
| `system-prompt.ts` | Thin loader using `loadPromptSync()` and `prometheusPromptVariants` from `@oh-my-opencode/prompts-core`; exports prompt source routing and disabled-tool filtering |
| `gpt.ts` | Thin loader for `PROMETHEUS_GPT_SYSTEM_PROMPT` from `packages/prompts-core/prompts/prometheus/gpt.md` |
| `gemini.ts` | Thin loader for `PROMETHEUS_GEMINI_SYSTEM_PROMPT` from `packages/prompts-core/prompts/prometheus/gemini.md` |
| `system-prompt.test.ts` | Runtime behavior tests for Question tool filtering |
| `prometheus-byte-exactness.test.ts` | Byte-exact sha256 characterization tests for all variants and Question disabled state |
| `packages/prompts-core/prompts/prometheus/default.md` | Default/Claude markdown prompt variant |
| `packages/prompts-core/prompts/prometheus/gpt.md` | GPT-optimized markdown prompt variant |
| `packages/prompts-core/prompts/prometheus/gemini.md` | Gemini-optimized markdown prompt variant |
zh_tw:
| 檔案 | 用途 |
|------|------|
| `index.ts` | 匯出總入口 |
| `system-prompt.ts` | 使用 `@oh-my-opencode/prompts-core` 中的 `loadPromptSync()` 與 `prometheusPromptVariants` 的薄型載入器；匯出 prompt 來源路由與已停用工具過濾 |
| `gpt.ts` | 從 `packages/prompts-core/prompts/prometheus/gpt.md` 載入 `PROMETHEUS_GPT_SYSTEM_PROMPT` 的薄型載入器 |
| `gemini.ts` | 從 `packages/prompts-core/prompts/prometheus/gemini.md` 載入 `PROMETHEUS_GEMINI_SYSTEM_PROMPT` 的薄型載入器 |
| `system-prompt.test.ts` | 用於 Question 工具過濾的執行期行為測試 |
| `prometheus-byte-exactness.test.ts` | 針對所有變體與 Question 停用狀態的逐位元組精確 sha256 特性測試 |
| `packages/prompts-core/prompts/prometheus/default.md` | 預設/Claude 的 Markdown prompt 變體 |
| `packages/prompts-core/prompts/prometheus/gpt.md` | 針對 GPT 最佳化的 Markdown prompt 變體 |
| `packages/prompts-core/prompts/prometheus/gemini.md` | 針對 Gemini 最佳化的 Markdown prompt 變體 |

original: ## MODEL VARIANT ROUTING
zh_tw: ## 模型變體路由

original: [`system-prompt.ts`](file:///Users/yeongyu/local-workspaces/omo/src/agents/prometheus/system-prompt.ts) exposes `getPrometheusPromptSource(model)`:
zh_tw: [`system-prompt.ts`](file:///Users/yeongyu/local-workspaces/omo/src/agents/prometheus/system-prompt.ts) 會提供 `getPrometheusPromptSource(model)`：

original:
- GPT family models, as detected by `isGptModel(model)`, route to `"gpt"`.
- Gemini family models, as detected by `isGeminiModel(model)`, route to `"gemini"`.
- Missing models and all other families route to `"default"`.
zh_tw:
- 由 `isGptModel(model)` 判定的 GPT 家族模型會路由到 `"gpt"`。
- 由 `isGeminiModel(model)` 判定的 Gemini 家族模型會路由到 `"gemini"`。
- 缺少模型以及所有其他家族都會路由到 `"default"`。

original: `getPrometheusPrompt(model, disabledTools)` then loads the selected markdown through `loadPromptSync({ source: prometheusPromptVariants[variant], name: "prometheus", variant })` and returns the loaded body.
zh_tw: `getPrometheusPrompt(model, disabledTools)` 接著透過 `loadPromptSync({ source: prometheusPromptVariants[variant], name: "prometheus", variant })` 載入所選的 markdown，並回傳載入後的內容。

original: ## DISABLED TOOL HANDLING
zh_tw: ## 已停用工具處理

original: Prometheus normally includes `Question({ ... })` examples because interview mode uses the Question tool to clarify scope. When the runtime passes `disabledTools` containing `"question"`, `getPrometheusPrompt()` strips fenced TypeScript `Question({ ... })` examples with `QUESTION_TOOL_BLOCK_RE` before returning the prompt.
zh_tw: Prometheus 通常會包含 `Question({ ... })` 範例，因為訪談模式會使用 Question 工具來釐清範圍。當執行期傳入的 `disabledTools` 包含 `"question"` 時，`getPrometheusPrompt()` 會在回傳 prompt 之前，使用 `QUESTION_TOOL_BLOCK_RE` 移除 fenced TypeScript `Question({ ... })` 範例。

original: This filtering is runtime adapter behavior. Do not duplicate stripped markdown variants in `packages/prompts-core`; keep one source of truth per model family and let `system-prompt.ts` remove Question examples only when the tool is disabled.
zh_tw: 這個過濾是執行期適配器行為。不要在 `packages/prompts-core` 中重複建立已移除內容的 markdown 變體；每個模型家族只保留一份單一真實來源，並讓 `system-prompt.ts` 只在工具被停用時移除 Question 範例。

original: ## KEY CONSTRAINTS
zh_tw: ## 主要限制

original:
- May ONLY create/edit `.md` files (enforced by hook)
- FORBIDDEN paths: `src/`, `package.json`, config files
- Must explore codebase before planning (NEVER plan blind)
- Plans saved to `.omo/plans/`
- Acceptance criteria requiring "user manually tests" are FORBIDDEN
- Prompt edits belong in [`packages/prompts-core/prompts/prometheus/`](file:///Users/yeongyu/local-workspaces/omo/packages/prompts-core/prompts/prometheus/), not in TypeScript section files
zh_tw:
- 僅可建立/編輯 `.md` 檔案（由 hook 強制）
- 禁止路徑：`src/`、`package.json`、設定檔
- 規劃前必須先探索 codebase（絕不可盲目規劃）
- 計畫會儲存到 `.omo/plans/`
- 需要「使用者手動測試」的驗收標準是禁止的
- Prompt 的修改應放在 [`packages/prompts-core/prompts/prometheus/`](file:///Users/yeongyu/local-workspaces/omo/packages/prompts-core/prompts/prometheus/)，而不是 TypeScript 區段檔案中

original: ## PLAN OUTPUT FORMAT
zh_tw: ## 計畫輸出格式

original: The markdown variants instruct Prometheus to produce YAML plans with a parallel task graph:
zh_tw: 這些 markdown 變體會指示 Prometheus 產生帶有平行任務圖的 YAML 計畫：

original:
- Waves (parallel execution groups)
- Tasks with dependencies, category, skills
- Each task has atomic scope + verification criteria
zh_tw:
- 波次（平行執行群組）
- 帶有相依性、類別、技能的任務
- 每個任務都有原子化範圍與驗證條件
